---
title: "Publications"
toc: false
---

::: {.section-block}
## Notes {.section-title}

- Source file: `data/publications.md`
- Recommended line style: Author list, "Title," *Journal*, (Year), DOI link
- Author contribution markers are preserved exactly as entered in the source file
:::

::: {.section-block .pub-list}
## Full List {.section-title}

{{< include data/publications.md >}}
:::
